name: Fajitas for Freezer
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steak in a quart-sized freezer bag.
2. Combine lime juice, white wine vinegar, salad oil, oregano, and crushed garlic cloves in the bag with the steak. Seal and freeze.
3. To bundle: Add flour tortillas and frozen vegetables to a gallon freezer bag.
4. To prepare: Remove thawed steak from its marinade and pan-sear in a hot pan until medium rare. Remove from the pan.
5. In the same pan, add frozen vegetables and remaining marinade; cover and cook until vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. While cooking the vegetables, slice the meat into thin slices against the grain.
7. Add the sliced meat to the cooked vegetables and salsa. Stir to heat through.
8. To serve, spoon the mixture onto a warmed flour tortilla. Garnish with avocado cubes, chopped tomato, or fresh cilantro.
Serving Ideas: Black Beans or Frijoles, Flan
